t_ch: 我跋涉千山、历经万难，终于抵达此处，只为一睹您神圣的尊容喀——

t_ch: 伟大的{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}！神秘的化身、永夜的星芒！只消看您这一眼，我此生便无憾了喀！
t_en: O mighty {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}! The incarnation of enigmas, starlight of eternal night! One glimpse of you fulfills my existence, crrk!

t_ch: 卷轴摆得太乱了，地毯歪歪扭扭，火盆里也堆积着许多灰烬……
t_en: The scrolls are arranged extremely messily, the carpet is crooked, and ash has piled up in the brazier...

t_ch: 得赶快收拾干净才行，不然对圣女大人的健康不好喀！
t_en: Need to tidy up fast for the Holy Maiden's wellbeing, crrrk!

t_ch: 得赶快收拾干净才行，小主人不知道什么时候就会回来喀……
t_en: Need to tidy up fast. The young master might come back any moment, crrrk...

t_ch: 话说回来，圣女大人…已经多久不曾回来了喀……
t_en: Speaking of Lady Holy Maiden... it's been so long since she came back, crrk...

t_ch: 嗨、朋友，你好喀！初次见面，相逢即有缘，陪我聊聊天喀！
t_en: Oh hey there, friend! What lovely luck running into you. Won't you stay for a chat, crrk?

t_ch: 和它聊聊。
t_en: Chat with it.

t_ch: 这就对了喀！我和你说，我知道的可多了喀！小到祭司们的八卦、大到长老们的机密，都能给你讲讲喀！
t_en: Now we're talking! I've got so much to share! Everything from priestly gossip to the Elders' confidential matters, crrrk!

t_ch: 继续听听。
t_en: Do tell.

t_ch: 偷偷告诉你喀，这边的祭司好多都是大坏蛋，经常打着命运泰坦的旗号，用假的神谕骗钱！

t_ch: 不仅如此，还有更过分的喀！你猜怎么着——
t_en: And oh boy, that's not even the half of it, crrk! Guess what else—

t_ch: 你继续说。
t_en: Go on.

t_ch: 好多人甚至在背后偷偷说圣女大人的坏话！是不是特别过分！你说是不是，喀！
t_en: Some of them are actually spreading rumors about Lady Holy Maiden! Can you believe how awful that is? Can you? Crrrk!

t_ch: 我懒得猜。
t_en: I'm not really interested.

t_ch: 喀！你怎么就走了喀！真是的，好不容易遇到个能听我说话的喀……
t_en: Hey! Don't go! I thought I'd finally found a good listener, crrk...

t_ch: 还是走吧。
t_en: Maybe next time.

t_ch: 喀！你怎么就走了喀！真是的，好不容易遇到个能听我说话的喀……
t_en: Hey! Don't go! I thought I'd finally found a good listener, crrk...

t_ch: 我赶时间。
t_en: I'm in a hurry.

t_ch: 喀！你怎么就走了喀！真是的，好不容易遇到个能听我说话的喀……
t_en: Hey! Don't go! I thought I'd finally found a good listener, crrk...

t_ch: 有位贤人说得好：「偷懒一时爽，一直偷懒一直爽」…喀？怎么又到了写工作报告的时间了…完全不想干活喀……
t_en: A sage once said: "Why work hard when you can hardly work?" Crrrk... Oh great, another report deadline. I'm SO not feeling this right now, crrk...

t_ch: …算了，这次也继续写「今日晴，无事」好了喀！
t_en: Forget it. I'm going with my usual "Nothing to report, business as usual"!

t_ch: 你也是来赏景的吗？那可真是来对地方了喀——这里人迹罕至、视野绝佳，之前一直是我的秘密基地来着喀！
t_en: Oh, you came for the view too? You're in luck, crrk! This spot's perfect — great view, no crowds — it's been my secret hideout!

t_ch: 瞧啊，群山绵延起伏，负世泰坦屹立于天地之间…每每看见这景象，我都不由感叹：大地何其壮阔、而虫何其渺小……

t_ch: 那帮目光短浅的家伙喀！凭什么我就不能当祭司——不就是遵循「命运」的指引作出预言嘛，我早晚也可以的！
t_en: Those narrow-minded fools, crrrk! Who says I can't be a priest? Following Fate's guidance to make prophecies — piece of cake! I'd nail it eventually!

t_ch: 它们一定是嫉妒我有潜力喀！与其信那些打击虫的鬼话，不如信我身后这堵坚硬的石墙会崩塌喀！
t_en: Ha! They're obviously just envious of my potential! I've got more faith in this wall crumbling than in their stupid criticisms, crrk!

t_ch: 我记得这里是列车着陆的地点…某种程度上讲，它的「预言」还挺灵验。

t_ch: 有没有人！快来救虫啊——要、要掉下去了喀！

t_ch: 哈哈——开玩笑的喀！放心吧，我有特殊的登高技巧喀！

t_ch: 瞧啊，此番美景，真教虫不禁诗兴大发喀——

t_ch: 欧洛尼斯，是机灵鬼；塔兰顿啊，可别得罪！

t_ch: 好难受啊…

t_ch: 何等丑陋的造物…

t_ch: 伟哉！欧洛尼斯！

t_ch: 那边是不是落了些尘土？

t_ch: 这里、看这里——
t_en: Hey, over here—

t_ch: 无心工作…
t_en: Not feeling like working...

t_ch: 如此壮美、如此宏伟…
t_en: How magnificent... such grandeur...

t_ch: 气死虫了…
t_en: I'm absolutely furious...

t_ch: 救虫啊——
t_en: Someone help—

t_ch: 我想成为一名诗人…
t_en: I want to be a poet...

t_ch: 是的，船长！！！

Buzz—

t_ch: 中间这棵。
t_en: The one in the middle.

t_ch: 竟然识破了我的走位！织者的尊严和连胜记录，都被打破了嗡……
t_en: You've seen through my moves!? My honor as a Weaver and my winning streak, both shattered, buzz...

t_ch: 右边这棵。
t_en: The one on the right.

t_ch: 答错了嗡！本蝶的走位，果然独步天下嗡！
t_en: Wrong, buzz! My moves are unmatched in the world, buzz!

t_ch: 发起进攻。
t_en: Attack.

t_ch: 是我家大大为我示现的启示，还是跨越时空的心有灵犀啾？
t_en: Is it a revelation granted by my master, or a connection beyond time and space, tweet?

t_ch: 据说在这里许愿时系上风铃，负日者就能听见我们的愿望。
t_en: It's said that tying a wind chime while making a wish here allows the Sunbearer to hear our desires.

t_ch: 我的愿望很简单嗡~
t_en: My wish is simple, buzz~

t_ch: 希望明天还能有阳光，晒干我被露水打湿的翅膀。
t_en: I hope for sunshine tomorrow to dry my dew-soaked wings.

t_ch: 命运牵引着你，来到我的藏身处了嗡！
t_en: Fate has guided you to my hiding place, buzz!

t_ch: 我自己找到的！
t_en: I found it myself!

t_ch: 你根本没在藏…

t_ch: 命运如同吾主大大的绳结，又像吾主太太的丝线，它们缠绕编织，成为连结我们的羁绊——

t_ch: 就是它带领你找到我的嗡！
t_en: And it's these bonds that led you to find me, buzz!

t_ch: 我想沿着时光的河水逆流而上…可是，我既无力违抗瀑流的冲刷，又不甘随波逐流、就此放弃。
t_en: I wish to swim against the current of time's river... yet I cannot resist the torrents nor resign myself to drifting along and giving up.

t_ch: 最终，不得不僵持在路途的中央。

t_ch: 可能，这就是蝶生吧……
t_en: Perhaps, that's just the life of a butterfly...

t_ch: 每天进步一点点…
t_en: Making progress day by day...

t_ch: 蝶爱世人…

t_ch: 嗨休、嗨休——

t_ch: 冲锋，突破迷雾！
t_en: Charge! Break through the mist!

t_ch: 我已听见雾角…
t_en: I hear the fog horn...

t_ch: 走位~看不见~
t_en: Moving~ Invisible~

t_ch: 啾！
t_en: Chirp!

t_ch: 叮叮当~
t_en: Ding-a-ling~

t_ch: 再坚持，哪怕一会儿也好…
t_en: Hold on, just a little longer...

t_ch: 你知道的，蝴蝶都是我兄弟，我和它们很早就认识了，这些家伙强得不可思议嘤……
t_en: You know, all butterflies are my brothers. I've known them for a long time, and they're incredibly strong, eep...

t_ch: 我决定把我的天赋带到蝴蝶一族中去嘤！
t_en: I've decided to bring my talents to the butterfly clan, eep!

t_ch: 哎呀呀，看你失望的表情，难道是在找什么别的东西吗？阳光下才没有隐藏的宝箱呢嘤~
t_en: Aw, why the long face? Looking for something else? There are no hidden chests under the sun, chirp~

t_ch: 在那位{RUBY_B#欧洛尼斯}岁月编织者{RUBY_E#}的帮助下，周围的空间会呈现相反的时空嘤。
t_en: With the help of the {RUBY_B#Oronyx}Weaver of Time{RUBY_E#}, the surrounding space will reflect an inverted timeline, eep.

t_en: If there are monsters, that means I'm on the right track!

t_ch: 呃~你该不会有什么奇怪的受虐癖吧嘤？
t_en: Uh~ don't tell me you have some sort of weird masochistic tendencies, eep?

t_ch: 贤者曾说：「谨慎能捕千秋萤。」小心点准没错的嘤。
t_en: A wise person once said, "With caution, one can catch the most cunning glowworm." Being careful never hurts, eep.

t_ch: 我记得这宝库里曾经琳琅满目，为何现在空空如也嘤？
t_en: I remember this treasury used to be filled with treasures. Why is it empty now, eep?

t_ch: 难道说，那些人把宝贝借走之后…就不打算还回来了吗嘤！
t_en: Could it be that those people borrowed the treasures and... never planned to return them, eep!?

t_ch: 这里可不是只要带着架梯子就能随意出入的地方嘤！只有被女王认可的勇士才能继续前进。
t_en: This isn't a place you can just waltz into with a ladder, eep! Only warriors approved by the queen may proceed.

t_ch: 听说那样的勇士能用投石击中巨人的独眼，你行吗嘤？
t_en: It's said that such warriors can strike a giant's single eye with a sling. Can you do that, eep?

t_ch: 嘤嘤~既然你打败我了，这次就先睁一只眼闭一只眼吧…我可是个尽职的守卫嘤！
t_en: Eep~ Since you've beaten me, I'll turn a blind eye this time... But remember, I'm a dedicated guard, eep!

t_ch: 不过，这里的人都去哪儿了呢嘤？
t_en: Still, where has everyone gone, eep?

t_ch: 听说月亮上也有萤生活，它耀眼的光芒就是它们发出来的。真想上去和它们一起生活啊嘤~
t_en: It's said that glowworms also live on the moon. Its brilliant glow comes from them. I'd love to live with them up there, eep~

t_ch: 好白的月亮，好大、好圆……
t_en: What a bright moon. So big, so round...

t_ch: 看到这炼金法阵了吗？据说它蕴含着强大的魔力，必须念对咒语才能发动嘤！
t_en: Do you see this alchemical matrix? It's said to contain immense magical power. You have to recite the spell correctly to activate it, eep!

t_ch: 一即是全，全即是一！见证吧嘤——
t_en: One is all, and all is one! Behold, eep—

t_ch: 没反应？好吧，或许是准备工作还不够嘤……
t_en: Nothing? Well, maybe the preparations aren't complete yet, eep...

t_ch: 你刚刚去了一趟｢死者的世界｣，经历了一场离别，对吧嘤？
t_en: You just visited the "World of the Dead" and experienced a parting, didn't you, eep?

t_ch: 闻到这空气中的花香了吗，那种花叫<color=#dbc291ff>安提灵花</color>…这安神的清香，我想我也该离开了嘤。
t_en: Do you smell the fragrance of flowers in the air? That's the scent of <color=#dbc291ff>Antila flowers</color>... This soothing scent reminds me that it's time to leave, eep.

t_ch: 我们的脚步总愿意在美曾经悲哀地生活过的土地上徘徊，好让我们意识到它并不属于尘世。
t_en: Our footsteps always linger on lands where beauty once lived sorrowfully, reminding us that such beauty does not belong to the mortal world.

t_ch: 这扇门后面飕飕冒冷风，都快要把我的屁股吹歪了，里面到底有什么东西啊嘤！
t_en: Cold wind is blowing out from behind this door, so strong it feels like it's twisting my backside — what's inside there, eep!?

t_ch: 哦…不对，我没有屁股，只有腹腔嘤~
t_en: Oh... wait, I don't have a backside, just an abdomen, eep~

t_ch: 我要加入你们嘤~
t_en: I wanna join you all, chirp~

t_ch: 阳光普照，万物显形嘤！
t_en: Sunlight reveals all, nothing stays hidden, chirp!

t_ch: 今天也很祥和呢~
t_en: What a peaceful day~

t_ch: 时间能做到什么…
t_en: What time can do...

t_ch: 救救嘤！
t_en: Help, chirp!

t_ch: 小心啊嘤~
t_en: Watch out, chirp~

t_ch: 宝贝们都去哪儿了…
t_en: Where did all my precious go...

t_ch: 让我看看你的能耐！
t_en: Show me what you've got!

t_ch: 瞄准了再打！
t_en: Aim before you shoot!

t_ch: 别愣着！
t_en: Don't just stand there!

t_ch: 用点力！
t_en: Try harder!

t_ch: 我…我还行！
t_en: I... I got this!

t_ch: 抬头看看月亮吧~
t_en: Behold the moon~

t_ch: 初次见面嘤…
t_en: Pleasure to meet you, chirp...

t_ch: 你回来了嘤…
t_en: Welcome back, chirp...

t_ch: 门的背后是什么…
t_en: What lies beyond the door...

t_ch: {M#他}{F#她}们什么时候回来…
t_en: When will they return...

t_ch: 嘤嘤~竟敢攻击女王大人的骑士，难道你是来袭击这座宫殿的入侵者吗？
t_en: Chirp, chirp~ How dare you attack the Queen's knight! Are you an intruder here to attack our palace?

t_ch: 你等着，等出征的黄金裔英雄们归来之后，我一定让他们为我的坐骑报仇！
t_en: Wait till our Chrysos Heir champions return from battle. They'll make you pay for what you did to my mount!

t_ch: 曾经盘踞于此的若虫们…消失了。
t_en: The nymphs that once resided here... have disappeared.

t_ch: 这很反常。脱离了阿格莱雅的金丝，失去赐福的若虫难以长久活动…除非受到了某种感召。
t_en: This is unusual. Without Lady Aglaea's golden threads, the unblessed nymphs cannot remain active for long... unless they have been summoned by something.

t_ch: 你注意到平台上留下了一行印记：｢我们在西风尽头等你。｣
t_en: You notice a mark left on the platform: "We await you at the end of the west wind."

t_ch: 西风尽头…遐蝶也曾这样称呼过冥界。但这怎么可能？
t_en: The end of the west wind... Castorice once referred to the nether realm in the same way, but how is this possible?

t_ch: 或许我应该到最后和她分别的地方去看看。
t_en: Perhaps I should go to the place where I last parted with her.

t_ch: 这里和你记忆中的那片花海颇为相像，但又有些许不同……
t_en: This place resembles the sea of flowers in your memory, but there are some subtle differences...

t_ch: 眼前的景象似乎是一幅再现记忆的画卷，被某种力量从过往之河中打捞上岸。它不是真正的冥界，否则你早已失去呼吸。
t_en: The scene before you seems like a painting of memories, fished out from the river of the past by some force. It is not the true nether realm, or else you would have already lost your breath.

t_ch: 在安提灵花的香气中，你想起了她曾经最爱的诗句——
t_en: Amidst the fragrance of Antila flowers, you recall the verses she once loved most —

t_ch: ｢我给你破旧的玩偶、残存的诗句、枯萎的花朵。｣
t_en: "I give you my old doll, the remnants of poems, and withered flowers."

t_ch: ｢我给你一个久久地望着孤月的人的悲哀。｣
t_en: "I give you the sorrow of one who gazes at the lonely moon for too long."

t_ch: 嗡嗡——我们受到亡语蝶的邀请，前来观看它们的最后一舞嗡。
t_en: Buzz buzz — We were invited by the Eulogistic Butterflies to witness their final dance.

t_ch: 嘤嘤——我听过亡语蝶的故事，它们一定是应某人所托，将冥河彼岸的信息转述给生者嘤。
t_en: Chirp chirp — I've heard the story of the Eulogistic Butterflies. They must have been entrusted by someone to convey messages from the other side of the River of Souls to the living.

t_ch: 喀喀——如此美丽的舞蹈，是为了传递思念吧喀。
t_en: Crrrk crrrk — Such a beautiful dance must be meant to convey longing.

t_ch: 看样子这支舞还会继续跳好久，我们人间再见吧。
t_en: It seems this dance will continue for a while longer. Let's meet again in the mortal world.

t_ch: 这里是距那些亡语蝶最近的地方，仿佛能看见它们身上的鳞粉——<color=#dbc291ff>它们飞舞的轨迹似乎是八个字符？</color>
t_en: This is the closest place to those Eulogistic Butterflies. You can almost see the scales on their wings — <color=#dbc291ff>their flight path seems to spell out eight characters?</color>

t_ch: 喂，别飞了！
t_en: Hey, stop flying!

t_ch: 就像听懂了你的话般，亡语蝶们果然开始散去……
t_en: As if understanding your words, the Eulogistic Butterflies begin to disperse...

t_ch: 就这样也好。
t_en: This is fine as it is.

t_ch: 这里是那些亡语蝶休息的地方。如果在这里说些什么的话，它们一定可以听清。
t_en: This is where those Eulogistic Butterflies rest. If you say something here, they will surely hear it clearly.

t_ch: 别睡了，起来飞！
t_en: Stop sleeping. Get up and fly!

t_ch: 就像听懂了你的话般，亡语蝶们果然开始飞上天空……
t_en: As if understanding your words, the Eulogistic Butterflies begin to fly into the sky...

t_ch: 就这样也好。
t_en: This is fine as it is.

t_ch: 角落里的阴影开始汇聚，呈现出…巴特鲁斯的模样。
t_en: The shadows in the corner begin to gather, taking the form of... Bartholos.

t_ch: 桀桀桀…没想到你居然能解开这又臭又长的古老谜题，真是不可小觑。
t_en: Hehehe... I didn't expect you to solve such a long and tedious ancient riddle. You're truly not to be underestimated.

t_ch: 既然如此，我便向你揭露这座古城内隐藏的房间吧。
t_en: In that case, I'll reveal the hidden room within this ancient city to you.

t_ch: 等下，你怎么在这儿？
t_en: Wait, why are you here?

t_ch: 打了这么久交道，你还不明白吗？这天底下就没有我巴特鲁斯钻不了的缝！
t_en: After all this time, you still don't understand? There's no crack in the world that Bartholos can't slip through!

t_ch: 你不会是预言请来的托吧？
t_en: You're not a plant hired by the prophecy, are you?

t_ch: 预言？什么预言？扎格列斯老祖想去哪儿就去哪儿，从来不被预言束缚，我也一样！
t_en: Prophecy? What prophecy? Old Zagreus goes wherever they please, never bound by prophecies. I'm the same!

t_ch: 隐藏房间？
t_en: A hidden room?

t_ch: 桀桀桀，没见过吧？有一座房间被人藏在了「岁月」的水面之下，是我最先发现的。我称之为「聪明绝顶的巴特鲁斯发现的隐藏房间」。
t_en: Hehehe, never seen one before? There's a room hidden beneath the surface of "time," and I was the first to discover it. I call it "The Hidden Room Discovered by the Brilliant Bartholos."

t_ch: 不要问我为什么能做到——「诡计」的神偷甚至可以把你兜里的钱替换成破瓦片，只需要擦肩而过的一瞬，并且保准不露馅！
t_en: Don't ask me how I did it — the divine thief of Trickery can even replace the money in your pocket with a shard of pottery in the blink of an eye, without you ever noticing!

t_ch: 要是哪天刻法勒的火种被人偷走了，元老院还像群鸵鸟一样后知后觉，我也完全不意外。
t_en: If one day the flame of Kephale is stolen, and the Council of Elders remains oblivious like a bunch of ostriches, I wouldn't be surprised at all.

t_ch: …嘛咪嘛咪哄！好了，我已经帮你拨开了帷幕，快去见识见识吧。
t_en: ...Eeny, meeny, miny, moe! Alright, I've pulled back the curtain for you. Go and take a look.

t_ch: 吼吼，你要进入「聪明绝顶的巴特鲁斯发现的隐藏房间」吗？
t_en: Hoho, are you going to enter "The Hidden Room Discovered by the Brilliant Bartholos"?

t_ch: 好，我进。
t_en: Yes. I'll enter.

t_ch: …嘛咪嘛咪哄！好了，我已经帮你拨开了帷幕，快去见识见识吧。
t_en: ...Eeny, meeny, miny, moe! Alright, I've pulled back the curtain for you. Go and take a look.

t_ch: 凭什么你能发现？
t_en: How did you manage to find it?

t_ch: {F#丫头}{M#小子}，不要小看了贼神的力量——「诡计」的神偷甚至可以把你兜里的钱替换成破瓦片，只需要擦肩而过的一瞬，并且保准不露馅！
t_en: {F#Lass}{M#Boy}, don't underestimate the power of the Thief God —the divine thief of Trickery can even replace the money in your pocket with a shard of pottery in the blink of an eye, without you ever noticing!

t_ch: 要是哪天刻法勒的火种被人偷走了，元老院还像群鸵鸟一样后知后觉，我也完全不意外。
t_en: If one day the flame of Kephale is stolen, and the Council of Elders remains oblivious like a bunch of ostriches, I wouldn't be surprised at all.

t_ch: 不进。
t_en: I won't enter.

t_ch: 没事了，玩儿去吧你。
t_en: Alright then. Go play somewhere else.

t_ch: 哟哟，你要离开「聪明绝顶的巴特鲁斯发现的隐藏房间」吗？
t_en: Yo yo, are you leaving "The Hidden Room Discovered by the Brilliant Bartholos"?

t_ch: 好，我出。
t_en: Yes. I'll leave.

t_ch: …芝麻关门！
t_en: Close sesame!

t_ch: 这里究竟是什么地方？
t_en: What exactly is this place?

t_ch: 桀桀桀…不知道。我是「贼灵」巴特鲁斯，不是「侦探」巴特鲁斯。
t_en: Hehehe... I don't know. I'm "Spirithief" Bartholos, not "Detective" Bartholos.

t_ch: 不过要我猜的话，这里可能是斯缇科西亚覆灭前的房间，被人用某种方式保留至今。
t_en: But if I had to guess, this might be a room from before the fall of Styxia, preserved by some means until now.

t_ch: 我从来没见过美丽的斯缇科西亚。它变成这幅破烂模样的时候，我还没出生呢。
t_en: I've never seen the beautiful Styxia. It was already in ruins by the time I was born.

t_ch: 不出。
t_en: I won't leave.

t_ch: 没事了，玩儿去吧你。
t_en: Alright then. Go play somewhere else.

t_ch: 它们都在里面…
t_en: They're all inside...

t_ch: 就我在这守门。
t_en: I'm the only one guarding the door.

t_ch: 真美啊…
t_en: So beautiful...

t_ch: 我也想和它们一起飞翔~
t_en: I long to soar with them as well~

t_ch: 这一定是某人的愿望。
t_en: This must be someone's deepest wish.

t_ch: 我已抵达朝圣终点…
t_en: I have arrived at the end of my pilgrimage...

t_ch: Mi~Re~Do~Mi~Re…
t_en: Mi~Re~Do~Mi~Re...

t_ch: 这只若虫趴在散发着神圣气息的圆台上，似乎在祭拜——又或是在打碟。
t_en: The nymph rests upon a sacred, glowing pedestal, as if in worship — or perhaps it's spinning some tracks.

t_ch: 我记得那只若虫唱过一段旋律…好像不是这个顺序？
t_en: I remember this nymph once sang a melody... though it doesn't seem to be in this order?

t_ch: 「Mi」…好像听到了什么声音，是乐声？
t_en: "Mi"... I think I hear something... is that music?

t_ch: 「Re」…我似乎在哪里听过这旋律，它应该是第二个音。
t_en: "Re"... I feel like I've heard this tune before, it should be the second note.

t_ch: 「Do」…这应该是第三个音。难道只有我能听见吗？
t_en: "Do"... this must be the third note. Am I the only one who can hear it?

t_ch: 「Mi」…这应该是第四个音。到底是什么旋律？
t_en: "Mi"... this is likely the fourth note. What melody is this?

t_ch: 「Re」…这应该是最后一个音了。
t_en: "Re"... this should be the final note.

t_ch: 我的背上是整个世界…
t_en: On my back rests the entire world...

t_ch: 这只虫托举着一个石球，仿佛在扮演「负世」的刻法勒。只要稍微不小心，这球就可能从它身上滚落……
t_en: This little creature bears a stone ball, playing the part of the "Burden of the World" Kephale. One slip, and the sphere could fall...

t_ch: 「用于劳作的双手最先消失」……
t_en: "The first to disappear were his hands that worked tirelessly"...

t_ch: 「之后是丈量大地的双腿」……
t_en: "Then, his legs that measured the earth"...

t_ch: 「直到维持身形的躯干破碎」……
t_en: "Until his torso that had held his body together shattered..."

t_ch: 「他的头颅仍在呢喃」。这应该就是谜题的答案？
t_en: "His head continued to murmur." Is this the puzzle's answer?

t_ch: 总感觉哪里有问题…好像不是这个顺序？
t_en: Something's wrong... Is this the correct order?

t_ch: 该走的路我已走过…
t_en: The path I was meant to take has already been walked...

t_ch: 真希望阳光永驻嗡…
t_en: How I long for the sunlight to never fade...

t_ch: 请允许我占用一点时间…
t_en: Please, allow me a moment of your time...

t_ch: 介绍伟大的天父刻法勒…
t_en: Let me introduce the mighty Sky Father Kephale...

t_ch: 若虫们的鸣叫声连成一片，仿佛夏日池塘中的青蛙——可惜翁法罗斯没有青蛙。
t_en: The chirping of the nymphs fills the air, blending together like the croaking of frogs in a summer pond — if only Amphoreus had frogs.

t_ch: 当若虫们填满这片柜台时，会有什么事情发生呢？
t_en: What will happen when the nymphs fill this counter?

t_ch: 我看到许多人往前去了嗡！持剑的卫兵，运送军备的公民…他们神色匆匆，有的身上还带着伤痕……
t_en: I saw so many people heading forward! Sword-wielding guards, civilians hauling supplies... They were in a rush and some of them were even wounded...

t_ch: 他们还会再回来吗？
t_en: Will they ever come back?

t_ch: 这里原本有个穿着粗俗的大高个，听见号角呼喊就匆忙走了。或许无论陪伴多久，我们都还是要奔赴属于各自的方向吧……
t_en: There was a big, burly guy here, dressed uncouth. Took off the second he heard the horn. Maybe no matter how long we travel together, we all have our own paths to follow in the end...

t_ch: 希望那些黑潮怪物，不要弄脏他原本就很土气的衣裳啊。
t_en: Hope those black tide monsters don't mess up his already-scruffy clothes.

t_ch: 嗡~浴场突然空荡下来，静悄悄的，难道今天浴池被本蝶包场了吗？
t_en: Hmm~? The baths are suddenly empty and silent... Did I just get a private spa day?

t_ch: 可是，总感觉有些孤独嗡……
t_en: But... why does it feel so lonely?

t_ch: 咕嘟咕嘟，头好晕，意识远去了，思绪模糊了，烦恼和忧愁也都通通融化了……
t_en: Bloop bloop... My head's spinning, my thoughts drifting, my worries and sorrows melting away...

t_ch: 是不是这样，白昼的快乐时光就能一直继续下去嗡？
t_en: If I keep this up, will the happy moments of the day last forever?

t_ch: 别再逃避了！
t_en: Stop running away!

t_ch: 给我也来一口。
t_en: Gimme a sip, too.

t_ch: 你也想喝嗡？那可不行，你不能在这里耽搁，你可是肩负使命的英雄……
t_en: You wanna drink too? No can do. You've got a hero's duty to fulfill.

t_ch: 啊——是啊！我也肩负着我家太太交付给我的使命呢。必须得启程了嗡！
t_en: Ah, right! I have a mission from my dear wife too. Time to get moving!

t_ch: 奇怪，怎么完全不觉得热呢？我明白了——一定是我的耐热训练终于见成效了嗡！
t_en: Weird... why don't I feel the heat? Oh, I know — it's proof my heat resistance training finally worked!

t_ch: 你说什么？是因为火炬已经熄灭了…？那种话本蝶听不懂啦。
t_en: What did you say? It's because the torch has been extinguished...? Nah, I don't know what you're talking about.

t_ch: 嗡嗡…天怎么阴沉下来了嗡，那些会偷偷闲聊，会互相蹭脸颊的大地兽们都去哪儿了嗡？
t_en: Grumph... Why's the sky turning gloomy? And where'd all the dromas go — the ones who used to rub each other's faces?

t_ch: 不行，不能哭。我已经是一只成熟的蝶了，我要像红土一样坚强嗡。
t_en: No, I can't cry. I'm a mature butterfly now. I'll be strong, like redsoil.

t_ch: 万物本是一，一生二，二生三；太阳为父，月亮为母；父母在，不远游……
t_en: All things are one, from which comes two, which splits into three. The sun is the father, the moon the mother. Wander not from filial duty...

t_ch: 世界能在转瞬间崩塌，但真理将继续长存嗡~
t_en: The world can crumble in an instant, but the truth will always endure~

t_ch: 别、别吃我，本蝶还很年轻，还有很多梦想没有实现…唔，原来你不是黑潮怪物！真是吓死蝶了！
t_en: N—No, don't eat me! I'm still young, with so many dreams left to chase! Oh... you're not a black tide monster? You nearly scared me to death!

t_ch: 记住，以后别再穿一身黑了嗡！
t_en: Listen, don't ever wear all black again!

t_ch: 迷糊姐姐的圣兽真的很抢手嗡。刚才大家逃难的时候，第一时间想到的竟然是把柜子上的小海豹们一起带走……
t_en: Miss Daze's divine beast is really popular. Even during the chaos of the evacuation, the first thing people thought of was to grab those little seals from the shelves...

t_ch: 也难怪啦，没有可爱的东西相伴，我们怎么能在这个世界上活下去嗡？
t_en: Can't blame them. How could we survive in this world without something cute to hold onto?

t_ch: 昔日簇拥在太太身前的先辈们，看到我们一次次竭尽全力，最终却只能换回虚无缥缈的未来，会作何感想呢？
t_en: The elders who once stood before the lady... if they saw us fighting with all our might, only to exchange it for an empty and bleak future, what would they think?

t_ch: 如果你们能说话，真想好好问问你们嗡……
t_en: If only you could speak, I have so many questions for you...

t_ch: 我一步一步，跨过浓浓的黑暗、孤独和寒冷，终于抵达了巅峰——现在，我谁都不放在眼里了！
t_en: Step by step, I climbed through darkness, loneliness, and cold. Finally, I reached the peak — And now? No one else matters to me!

t_ch: 因为这里根本就没有人了嗡。
t_en: Because there's no one left here.

t_ch: 黑潮来势汹涌，家人们都被冲散了，不知何时才能再度相见……
t_en: The black tide came crashing in, scattering my family far and wide. Who knows when we'll see each other again...

t_ch: 不过我一点也不怕！衣匠姐姐手里的剑，会保护蝶和其他若虫们的…对吧？
t_en: But I'm not afraid at all! Miss Garmentmaker's sword will protect me and the other little nymphs... right?

t_ch: 刚才在这儿讲课的讲师，压根不懂黄金时代的历史嗡。
t_en: The lecturers speaking here earlier didn't know a thing about the Golden Age.

t_ch: 要是他们真的懂，就会明白现在逃跑也无济于事了嗡……
t_en: Otherwise, they'd know running away now won't change anything...

t_ch: 你也是来听水漫琴的嗡？他们都忙着逃跑，除了你和我，似乎没有人愿意停留了嗡……
t_en: You're here for the water lyre too? Everyone else is too busy fleeing... Seems like it's just you and me who are willing to stay...

t_ch: 真是不解风情呀，欣赏这样一场绝唱的机会，我愿意用生命交换嗡。
t_en: Such a lack of appreciation... I'd trade my life for the chance to witness an unprecedented performance like this.

t_ch: 紧张刺激的逃亡时刻，没有灯照明前路怎么能行？就让本蝶来当此重任吧！
t_en: How can we escape in this thrilling moment without lights illuminating the way forward? Leave that to me!

t_ch: 这样才算一场完美的逃生之旅嗡~
t_en: Now this is what I call a perfect escape!

t_ch: Zzz…唔，不小心打了个盹…我睡了多久？
t_en: Zzz... Huh? Dozed off for a sec... How long was I out?

t_ch: 嗯嗯？什么叫「新的纷争半神回到了他忠实的悬锋城」「树庭贤人在公民大会激昂陈词」「黄金裔即将揭开再创世的新篇」？！
t_en: Wait, what? The new demigod of Strife has returned to his loyal Castrum Kremnos!? The Sage of the Grove delivered a rousing speech at the citizens' assembly!? Chrysos Heirs are about to unveil the next chapter of Era Nova!?

t_ch: 我到底错过了多少集！
t_en: Just how many episodes did I miss!?

t_ch: 原本我有个更叛逆的名字，但之前我比较怂，一直没敢说出来…事已至此，也没什么好害羞的了——
t_en: I used to have a much more rebellious name, but I was too much of a coward to say it out loud... Now at this point, there's nothing to be shy about—

t_ch: 你把第一个字去了看看。
t_en: Try removing the first word.

t_ch: 唉，参天大树耗费多少年月才长出这样的枝桠，难道就要这样毁于一旦吗……
t_en: *sigh* How many years did it take for that towering tree to grow those branches... And now, it's all about to be destroyed...

t_ch: 真怀念我们的大大…如果它还在，一定能想出办法嗡。
t_en: I miss our boss... If it were still here, it would've come up with a solution, for sure.

t_ch: 是不是觉得我能穿墙很奇怪？是不是已经想要打开石板上的问题反馈面板？且慢！
t_en: You think it's weird that I can phase through walls? You're already reaching for the bug report panel on the slate, aren't you? Hold it right there!

t_ch: 你要记住，先别管记住什么但你记住——在这个世界里，是什么都可以发生的嗡！
t_en: You must remember this, it doesn't matter if you can't remember anything else. In this world, anything can happen!

t_ch: 嗡嗡，有对情侣之前老在这说着天长地久的誓言，本蝶都快听腻了。
t_en: Hmph... There used to be a couple here, always whispering vows of eternal love. I heard them so much that I was sick of it.

t_ch: 在这末世里，他们会共渡患难，还是大难临头各自飞呢？真想一探究竟嗡！
t_en: Now at doomsday, will they stick together through thick and thin... or flee in different directions when disaster strikes? I'd love to find out!

t_ch: 或许，这也是一种职业病吧……
t_en: Maybe that's just my occupational habit...

t_ch: …还会再回来吗？
t_en: ...Will they ever come back?

t_ch: 我才没在担心！
t_en: I'm not worried!

t_ch: 一只蝶独享！
t_en: A butterfly's exclusive treat!

t_ch: 什么也不想看…
t_en: Don't wanna see anything...

t_ch: 卓有成效嗡！
t_en: Made some solid progress!

t_ch: 我要坚强嗡…
t_en: I must be strong...

t_ch: 黑潮怪物，别过来啊！
t_en: Black tide monster, stay back!

t_ch: 哼哼，追得上吗？
t_en: Heh, think you can catch me?

t_ch: 吃我的鳞粉吧~
t_en: Eat my scale dust~

t_ch: 豹~
t_en: Seal~

t_ch: 谁都不放在眼里！
t_en: No one matters to me!

t_ch: 大家都离开了…
t_en: Everyone's gone...

t_ch: 还是太嫩！
t_en: Still too green!

t_ch: 请往这边~
t_en: This way, please~

t_ch: Zzz…
t_en: Zzz…

t_ch: 我不是正经的蝶~
t_en: I am not a seriousfly~

t_ch: 真可惜啊…
t_en: What a shame...

t_ch: 且慢！
t_en: Wait a minute!

t_ch: 职业病犯了…
t_en: Occupational habit kicking in...

t_ch: 幽邃的黑夜里能有一盏篝火驱散寒冷，是多么一件幸福的事啊…让人想要把那火光紧紧抱在怀里，融进自己的身体里嗡……
t_en: In the deep, dark night, what a blessing it is, to have a bonfire to chase the cold away... Makes you want to hold onto that flame, press it close, let it melt into you...

t_ch: 现在你们懂得我们不顾一切也要扑向火光的心情了吧！
t_en: Now you understand what it feels like to be a moth to the flame!

t_ch: 人，你现在一定很迷茫，很痛苦吧…蝶…帮不了你。
t_en: Human, you must be lost and in pain right now... But I... I can't help you.

t_ch: 但你一定有那样的时刻，在你的童年时光，在旅途中，或者只是再普通不过的一瞬间，某一句话、某一道风景、某一个笑颜，让你觉得自己依然能够活下去。
t_en: But there must have been a moment — whether in your childhood, during your travels, or just an ordinary instant — when a word, a scene, or a smile made you feel like you could keep going.

t_ch: 想想那一刻吧，但愿它能为你带来一些安慰……
t_en: Think of that moment. May it bring you a little comfort...

t_ch: 好惊险，刚才脚下的拱环忽然变成了蓝色的虚影，害得本蝶差点摔下山崖嗡！
t_en: That was close! The arch under my feet suddenly turned into a blue phantom, and I almost tumbled off the cliff!

t_ch: 看得见碰不着，飞到里头也没有特别的感觉，好奇怪的玩意嗡……
t_en: One can see it, but can't touch it. Even flying through it feels like nothing special. What a strange thing...

t_ch: 我是响应吾主呼唤的骑士，寻觅着足以破除愚昧迷雾、阐明万物运行的真理…可邪祟的势力太过猖狂，连我也不得不暂避锋芒嗡！
t_en: I am the knight summoned by my master, seeking the truth that dispels the fog of ignorance and reveals the workings of all things... But the forces of fiendlings are too rampant, and even I must momentarily retreat!

t_ch: 驾，飞天坛递！
t_en: Giddy-up, Flying Amphora!

t_ch: 无礼，这种危急关头，你竟不遵守骑士礼仪，偷袭了我心爱的坐骑！
t_en: How rude! At such a critical moment, you disregarded knightly etiquette and ambushed my beloved steed!

t_ch: 但是无妨——我将秉承吾主的意志，和邪祟势力战斗到底嗡！
t_en: But it doesn't matter — I shall uphold my master's will and fight against the forces of fiendlings to the very end!

t_ch: 水手，你还未曾见过这样的惊涛骇浪吧？
t_en: Sailor, have you ever seen waves like these before?

t_ch: 乌云像山峰一样倾倒，狂风要把长帆撕破。四周只有无边无际的黑暗，你感觉整个世界都把你抛弃了，简直不知道往何处去……
t_en: The storm clouds topple like mountains, the raging winds threaten to tear the sails apart. Nothing but boundless darkness surrounds you, and it feels as if the whole world has abandoned you. You have no idea where to go...

t_ch: 扯足帆，左满舵。打起精神来水手，别让桅杆碰着你的头——我们要迎向那浪潮！
t_en: Full sail, hard to port! Chin up, sailor, and mind your head — we're heading straight into the waves!

t_ch: 因为怕痛就全点了速度！现在我的战绩是，躲过了十颗陨石，甩掉了二十只怪物！
t_en: I maxed out my speed because I hate pain! So far, I've dodged ten meteors and shaken off twenty monsters!

t_ch: 可是…速度再快，又怎么能逃得过命运呢……
t_en: But... no matter how fast I am, can I really outrun fate...?

t_ch: 啾！被你发现了~
t_en: Tweet! You found me~

t_ch: 勇士啊，恭喜你顺利征讨了多目的盲者啾！我也该回去报告这个喜讯了啾！
t_en: Warrior, congratulations on defeating the many-eyed blind one! Tweet! I should return and report this joyous news, tweet!

t_ch: 嗡嗡，多少个日日夜夜我在这里虔诚祈祷，许愿黎明能够永远继续。现在看来，根本没有用！
t_en: I've prayed devoutly here for countless days and nights, wishing that dawn would last forever. And now... it turns out it was all for nothing!

t_ch: 看来要创造若虫的幸福，只能靠我们自己嗡……
t_en: Looks like if we want happiness for nymphs, we'll have to rely on ourselves...

t_ch: 命运如同吾主大大的绳结，又像吾主太太的丝线，它们缠绕编织，勾画出我们一生的脉络。
t_en: Fate is like the knot tied by my master, or the thread spun by my lady. They entwine and weave to illustrate the paths of our lives.

t_ch: 现在它们牵引着我们，来到了最后的结局。
t_en: And now, they pull us toward the final conclusion.

t_ch: 啊，原来，世界要迎来它的尽头了。
t_en: Ah, so this is it — the end of the world.

t_ch: 为了证明自己能逆流而上，我这一生都在这条小小的瀑布里挣扎。现在看来，我错过了多少鲜花、多少蜜汁啊。
t_en: To prove I could swim against the current, I spent my whole life struggling in this tiny waterfall. Now I wonder how many flowers I've missed and how much nectar I've overlooked.

t_ch: 穷极一生和流水较劲，这一切的一切，真的有意义吗……
t_en: A lifetime spent fighting the current... Was it really worth it?

t_ch: 光明啊…
t_en: Oh, light...

t_ch: 想想那一刻…
t_en: Think of that moment...

t_ch: 千钧一发——
t_en: Just in the nick of time...

t_ch: 驾，飞天坛递！
t_en: Giddy-up, Flying Amphora!

t_ch: 继续航向远方…
t_en: Onward, to the distant horizon...

t_ch: 走位~砸不中~
t_en: Dodge! You can't hit me~

t_ch: 啾！
t_en: Tweet!

t_ch: 都是命运的安排…
t_en: It's all part of the fate's design...

t_ch: 还有意义吗…
t_en: Does it still mean anything...

t_ch: 怎么，我挡着你看风景了吗，稍等一下，我马上就飞走了。
t_en: What? Am I blocking your view? Just a moment. I'm about to fly away.

t_ch: 你要飞到哪里去？
t_en: Where are you flying to?

t_ch: 不知道，我也不知道自己要去往何方，干脆我就这样去往彼岸吧。
t_en: No idea. I don't even know where I want to fly toward. So, why not just fly to the other shore?

t_ch: 你现在就给我飞走。
t_en: You can go ahead and fly away now.

t_ch: 果然我天生就遭人嫌弃，你别催了，我马上就离开，永远地离开。
t_en: Just like I thought, I naturally cause people to dislike me. Don't rush me. I'll leave right away. I'll leave forever.

t_ch: 物流机巧鸟还会说话？
t_en: Courier cycranes can talk?

t_ch: 对不起，给你造成麻烦了。不过你放心，很快我就不会再说话了。
t_en: Sorry to disturb you, but don't worry. Soon, I won't be able to speak again.

t_ch: 我要从这里飞下去自毁，告别我短暂的鸟生，请你不要来劝我了，我心意已决。
t_en: I plan to fly down from here and end my existence. I will say goodbye to my short avian existence. Don't try to deter me. I've already made up my mind.

t_ch: …请你千万不要模仿，千万不要，我可不想对陌生人负责。
t_en: ...Please do not attempt to imitate me under any circumstances. Just don't do it. I do not want to bear the responsibility for a stranger's life.

t_ch: 怎么，你还想再劝我两句？
t_en: What? Are you still trying to talk me out of it?

t_ch: 好消极的一只鸟。
t_en: What a pessimistic bird.

t_ch: 心事藏不住啊，看来你是一个关心我的人。好吧，我就再陪你聊几句。
t_en: You can't hide your feelings. I can tell you are someone who cares about me. Fine. I will take some time to talk with you.

t_ch: 你不是说不要劝你了吗？
t_en: Didn't you say you refused to let me change your mind?

t_ch: 我说不要劝，你就真的不劝，你愿意把我的话听进去，我很感动。
t_en: I asked for you not to dissuade me, and you did just that. You take my words so seriously. I'm very grateful.

t_ch: 就凭这份交情，我就再陪你聊几句。
t_en: I will talk with you for a moment out of respect for our friendship.

t_ch: 千万不要想不开呀。
t_en: Don't think yourself into a corner.

t_ch: 哎，你说的对，我这小小内存不够去想那些复杂的事情。
t_en: Ah, you're right. I have far too little RAM to understand such complex matters.

t_ch: 你是个好心人，我愿意陪你再聊几句。
t_en: You are a kind person. I'm willing to talk with you for a moment more.

t_ch: 其实我已经尝试自毁很多回了，但是我每次从港口掉下去一定深度，名叫「鹤运物流安全系统」就会自动接管我的运动组件。
t_en: I've actually tried to self-destruct on many occasions, but every time I plunge to a certain depth in the port, something called the Heron Express Safety System will automatically take over my movement components.

t_ch: 我又飞上来了。
t_en: And then I fly back up here.

t_ch: 身体根本不由我自己作主，我连自毁都做不到，做鸟还有什么意思呢？你说，你们人类如果总是身不由己，你会不会对生活感到失望？
t_en: Without any bodily autonomy, I can't even decide when I can end this life. Is there any meaning to living such life as a bird? What would you say? If you humans had no autonomy over your own bodies, wouldn't you feel hopeless about life?

t_ch: 我也会失望。
t_en: I would feel hopeless, too.

t_ch: 哎，人亦如此，何况鸟乎？
t_en: Indeed, the same is true with humans. How much truer could it be for birds?

t_ch: 看起来你并不是一个特别的人，我也不是一只特别的鸟，生活应该允许我们感到悲伤。
t_en: You don't seem like someone that special, and neither am I a special bird. We should be able to feel sadness.

t_ch: 我会奋起反抗。
t_en: I would rise up in resistance.

t_ch: 反抗？这说明你很了不起，将来…不，现在你可能就是个大人物。
t_en: Resistance? This shows that you are incredible. In the future, you will become... No, you are probably a great person right now.

t_ch: 我很了解我自己，我只是一只忧伤的小小鸟，想飞都飞不了太高。
t_en: I understand myself. I'm but a little, tiny, minuscule bird bogged down with sorrow, one who wishes flight yet is altitudinally challenged.

t_ch: 我这样的鸟就不应该和生活硬碰硬，应该和生活达成和解。
t_en: A bird such as myself shouldn't confront life head-on. I should come to terms with life.

t_ch: 习惯了就不会失望了。
t_en: If you are accustomed to something, you won't be disappointed.

t_ch: 这你还能习惯？你简直是比我还消极。听鸟一句劝，千万不可以习惯。
t_en: Can one get accustomed to this? You're the more pessimistic one, if you ask me. Hear a bird out. You can never allow yourself to grow accustomed to this.

t_ch: 要始终对生活保持好奇与热情！
t_en: You must always maintain a curiosity and a passion for life!

t_ch: …听上去都不像是一只忧郁的机巧鸟应该说出的话了。
t_en: ...That doesn't sound like something a depressed cycrane would say.

t_ch: 跟你聊了几句，我觉得豁然开朗。算了，我也不打算自毁了，就这样挺好。
t_en: After speaking with you, I feel as if I have been enlightened. Never mind. I no longer wish to end my existence. This life is good.

t_ch: 机巧鸟都像你这样能说会道吗？
t_en: Are all cycranes such gifted orators?

t_ch: 据我所知，不是的。鹤运物流的机巧鸟是用来运送快递的，赶路就挺忙的了，没有搭载闲聊功能的必要。
t_en: Not as far as I know. The cycranes of Heron Express are used for courier services. They are all busy rushing to their destinations. There is no need for cycranes to come equipped with a chat function.

t_ch: 对嗷，我是怎么回事呢？
t_en: Now that I think about it, how can I talk?

t_ch: 我只记得…突然我就能说会道了，我也不是很清楚。
t_en: All I remember is... suddenly I'm able to speak. I can't recall any specifics.

t_ch: 我现在还不知道你忧郁的理由。
t_en: I still don't know why you are depressed.

t_ch: 有一天，我突然意识到自己是一只物流机巧鸟。每天就是读取物流数据，将包裹送到仙舟各处，我认为这样的工作很没有美感。
t_en: One day, I suddenly became aware of the fact that I was a courier cycrane. Every day my tasks include reading logistics data and carrying packages throughout the Xianzhou. There was no aesthetics involved in work of this nature, I reckon.

t_ch: 几番考虑之后我决定裸辞，离开原本的生活轨迹。为了防止鹤运物流找上我，我还把追踪信号屏蔽了，以为这样做就已经自由了。
t_en: After giving it some thought, I decided to leave my job. I stepped off of my life path. To prevent Heron Express from finding me, I jammed my tracking beacon. I assumed that in doing so I would be free.

t_ch: 裸辞之后，我反而不知道自己应该干什么了。除了运送物流，我根本一无是处，于是我就忧郁了。
t_en: After leaving my job, I realized I didn't know what I should be doing. I knew nothing beyond making shipments. I became depressed.

t_ch: 还挺好理解的吧？
t_en: Pretty understandable, right?

t_ch: 你接下来打算做什么呢？
t_en: What do you plan to do now?

t_ch: 我现在打算回去再做做物流的工作，也许之前的生活也没有那么不堪。
t_en: I would go back to my courier job. Perhaps my former life was not so terrible.

t_ch: 给你一个建议，你去找鹤运物流的梓桥。报上我的名字…该死，我甚至没有一个名字。告诉她，是你劝说我回到工作岗位的，也许你还能获得一些什么奖励。
t_en: Allow me to give you a recommendation. Go and find Ziqiao who works at Heron Express. You can mention my name... Darn it, I don't even have a name. Tell her, you're the one who convinced me to return to my position. Perhaps you will receive some kind of reward.

t_ch: 就当作是我的赠礼吧。
t_en: Consider it my gift.

t_ch: 再见了，陌生的朋友。
t_en: Goodbye, dear stranger and friend.

t_ch: 我遇到了一只忧伤的机巧鸟。
t_en: I came across a depressed cycrane.

t_ch: 一只什么鸟？
t_en: A what cycrane?

t_ch: 一只忧伤的机巧鸟。
t_en: A depressed cycrane.

t_ch: 我知道你说了「一只忧伤的机巧鸟」，只是我没能理解这句话的意思。
t_en: I know you said, "a depressed cycrane," but I don't understand what you mean.

t_ch: 一只出故障的机巧鸟。
t_en: A malfunctioning cycrane.

t_ch: 这下我听懂了，不过还是麻烦你仔细讲讲。
t_en: That I can understand, but I'll still trouble you to explain all of this to me in detail.

t_ch: 就是这鸟架上的同款。
t_en: It's the same model as this cycrane.

t_ch: 嗯，仙舟上到处都能遇到，毕竟它们要送快递嘛…要不，你再讲讲「忧伤」是什么情况？
t_en: Uh-huh. You can see them all over Xianzhou. They handle deliveries... Why don't you tell me about what this "depressed" business is all about?

t_ch: 你尝试解释了你的遭遇，以及你是如何劝说那只生无可恋的机巧鸟回到鹤运物流。
t_en: You attempted to explain what you encountered as well as how you convinced this cycrane that had nothing left to live for to return to Heron Express.

t_ch: 随后，梓桥检查了物流机巧鸟的工作情况，发现你所说的一切属实——在那个时间点，有一只机巧鸟重新接回了物流系统。
t_en: After listening to your story, Ziqiao examined the work status of courier cycranes. She discovered that everything you said could be verified. At that moment, a cycrane got reconnected to the logistics system.

t_ch: 它真的能跟你对话？我不信。
t_en: Was it really able to speak with you? I can hardly believe it.

t_ch: 要警惕人工智能觉醒毁灭人类。
t_en: It's a warning of an AI awakening that will destroy mankind.

t_ch: 人工智能崛起？你该不会说的是「金人谋反」吧，那是我出生以前的事了。你放心，云骑军绝不应许这样的事情发生。
t_en: An AI uprising? You aren't talking about the "Aurumaton Rebellion," are you? That happened before I was born. Take it easy. The Cloud Knights would never let something like that happen.

t_ch: 再说，这机巧鸟态度消极，说不定毁灭人类之前，自己就先毁灭了。
t_en: Besides, who knows. This cycrane is so pessimistic, it might destroy itself before it ever destroys humanity.

t_ch: 可能是不愿意跟你说话吧。
t_en: Or maybe it isn't willing to speak with you.

t_ch: …我可没少对机巧鸟说话呀，按道理来说，它也应该对我敞开心扉。
t_en: ...I often speak with cycranes. Logically, they are completely open to me.

t_ch: 会不会是因为你缺乏魅力？
t_en: Is it because you lack charm?

t_ch: 不，我从小就受人追捧，非要说魅力的话，我和你是平分秋色。
t_en: I can't be. I have been popular with people since I was young. When it comes to having charm, we would be well-matched with each other.

t_ch: 没有人会对自己的老板敞开心扉。
t_en: No one would be so open with their own boss.

t_ch: 我可不是什么老板，非要说的话，我和这些物流机巧鸟应该是同事关系。
t_en: I'm not some boss. If I have to say it, these courier cycranes and I are more like coworkers.

t_ch: 有没有可能是你不知道呢？
t_en: Is it possible that you just don't know?

t_ch: …我可没少对机巧鸟说话呀，要是能聊天，它们早就跟我聊起来了。
t_en: ...I talk with cycranes frequently. If they could talk, they would have talked to me by now.

t_ch: 说到底，我们根本没有给物流机巧鸟搭载任何智能，硬件条件也不允许啊。也许是你幻听了？或者是有人假装是机巧鸟与你对话？
t_en: Besides, we never equipped these courier cycranes with any intelligence in the first place. The hardware components simply couldn't allow for it. Maybe you were just hearing things? Or perhaps someone was talking to you disguised as a cycrane?

t_ch: 你要不要再仔细查一查？
t_en: Do you want to look into it more closely?

t_ch: 你这么一说，可能真是我听错了。
t_en: The way you said that makes me wonder if I really misheard the entire thing.

t_ch: 不过为了保险起见，我还是再查一遍。
t_en: I'll look into it, just to be on the safe side.

t_ch: 你稍等，我再查一下…等等，不好了！
t_en: Wait a moment. I'll check... Hold on. This isn't good!

t_ch: 除了它，还有好几只机巧鸟也失去了联系…不会真的是什么机巧鸟大罢工了吧？
t_en: Aside from the cycrane you mentioned, we've lost connection with several other cycranes... This isn't some kind of cycrane labor strike, is it?

t_ch: 肯定是「友商」干的好事！
t_en: This must be the work of a competitor!

t_ch: 你是指友商想拆机，看看这物流机巧鸟的内部结构。
t_en: You were suggesting that a competitor wanted to dismantle the courier cycranes and see their internal structure.

t_ch: …结果还做出了能说会道的版本，这不是比鹤运物流的技术部门好太多了吗？
t_en: ...Then they went a step further and made a version that could speak. Isn't that a technical skill that's better than the Technology Division of Heron Express?

t_ch: 能够变形的金属生命体干的！
t_en: It was the work of a metal life form that could transform!

t_ch: 「岁阳之祸」的岁阳也是生命体，当初也是它们也占领了金人的身体…你这样的担心也有一定的道理。
t_en: The heliobi of the Heliobi Disaster were also life forms back then, and they were the ones that possessed the aurumatons' bodies... Your concerns did have some merit.

t_ch: 不过，既然能够附身的话，为什么不变成更酷的东西呢？
t_en: However, if they are able to possess robotic bodies, then why not become something more ruthless?

t_ch: 比如说星槎，「星槎人——随时变形状——」，我觉得那还要更厉害一些……
t_en: For example, a starskiff. A starskiff that could transform at will would have been far more impressive...

t_ch: 你们的客户都不是什么善茬。
t_en: Your customers are bad news.

t_ch: 你是说可能是我们的客户擅自改造了机巧鸟…罗浮仙舟上怪人很多，说不定真的有人生了什么大病、搞出这些破事……
t_en: You're saying that one of our customers might have made unauthorized modifications to the cycranes? There are loads of weird people on the Xianzhou Luofu. It's possible that someone went off the deep end and wanted to stir some trouble...

t_ch: 这样吧，我能拜托你帮我留个神吗？如果你在哪里又遇到了这些「有故障的机巧鸟」，请帮我把它们带回来，可以吗？
t_en: If that's the case, can I have you keep an eye out for me? If you come across any "malfunctioning cycranes," please bring them back. Is that OK?

t_ch: 我是为了领奖励才来找你的。
t_en: I came to find you because I wanted a reward.

t_ch: 我可没准备什么奖励啊…你要是早点说的话，也许能准备点什么。
t_en: I haven't prepared any reward to give you... I might have been able to get something together if you said something earlier.

t_ch: …那个，要是不嫌弃的话，我请你一杯仙人快乐茶？
t_en: ...Well. If you don't mind, I can treat you to a glass of Immortal's Delight.

t_ch: 有没有什么线索呢？
t_en: Do you have any leads?

t_ch: 我也是才知道有这么一件事儿，哪有什么线索啊…我还得抽时间查一下。
t_en: I've only just learned of this issue. How would I have any leads? I need to find time to investigate the matter.

t_ch: 过段时间你再来问我吧。
t_en: Talk to me a little later.

t_ch: 我尽量帮忙。
t_en: I'll do my best.

t_ch: 太好了，这样吧，我这里还有一杯没开封的仙人快乐茶，就先送给你了。
t_en: Great. I have a glass of unopened Immortal's Delight. I'll give it to you.

t_ch: 嘿嘿嘿，路过的{F#小美女}{M#小帅哥}，停一下，停一下。
t_en: Hehehe. Hey, {F#beautiful}{M#handsome}, stop right there.

t_ch: 别走过头了，爷在这儿呢，嘻嘻。
t_en: Don't walk too far. I'm right here. Hehe.

t_ch: 来呀，你来嘛，快来嘛……
t_en: Come on over. Hurry up...

t_ch: 一只鹤运物流的机巧鸟眯起眼地盯着你，似乎带着某种危险的引诱。
t_en: A cycrane from Heron Express squints its eyes at you with a gaze that seems to lure you with an air of danger.

t_ch: 你本不想使用「猥琐」这种词汇描述来形容一只无辜的机巧鸟，但是，你的直觉告诉你，在这只鸟眼中流转着的毫无疑问就是某种欲望——
t_en: You don't want to use a word like "obscene" to describe this innocent cycrane, but your intuition tells you that the eyes of this cycrane are without a doubt swimming in a certain kind of craving.

t_ch: 抛开世俗的常识与规则，机巧鸟也会和人类一样，需要用礼教的束缚来遮掩内心的燥动与不可告人的思绪吗？想到这里，你不禁{F#背后一寒}{M#虎躯一震}。
t_en: If you're to toss out worldly common sense and rules, you can see how cycranes and people are the same. They require the restrictions of ethics to cover the stirrings of their hearts and the thoughts they can't tell others. As you think about it, you can't help but {F#feel a chill down your spine}{M#shudder in shock}.

t_ch: 也许这只是一个误会，但你不禁先入为主。随后你意识到你应该抛下这样无来由的成见，与它光明磊落地进行一次谈话。
t_en: Maybe it's just a misunderstanding, but first impression is the strongest. You then realize you should drop this kind of baseless prejudice and talk with the cycrane candidly.

t_ch: 现在，就正义凛然地盯着它好了。
t_en: Now the right thing to do is fix your eyes on it with dignity and honor.

t_ch: 你干嘛瞪着我！虽说爷平易近人天生丽质，但是被你这样一直盯着，难免还是有点羞涩，你呀…居心不良。
t_en: What's the big idea staring at me? Sure, I'm approachable and naturally pleasing to the eye, but your staring has me feeling a bit shy. You... are up to no good.

t_ch: 我一句话都还没有说呢…
t_en: I haven't even said anything yet...

t_ch: 哎哟哟哟。你有什么心思，我会不明白吗？你跟我都不是什么好鸟……
t_en: Hey now. What's on your mind? Think I won't understand? You and I are bad birds of a feather...

t_ch: 是你一直不怀好意地盯着我。
t_en: You were the one who kept giving me that nasty look.

t_ch: 哎呦呦呦，你这有机生物怎么这么呆板？我这能是不怀好意？我这明明满含爱意。
t_en: Ah, come on. How can an organic like you could be so dense? How could I be giving you a nasty look? I'm nothing but love over here.

t_ch: 哎，有机生物真下头，所以说，有机生物还是不行。
t_en: Geez, organic life forms are so lowly. That's why you organics can't cut it.

t_ch: 是会说话的机巧鸟！
t_en: A talking cycrane!

t_ch: 嘻嘻，爷会说话就让你这么兴奋吗，还会说酸溜溜的情话，你要不要听？
t_en: Hehe. Does my ability to talk get you that excited? I can also tell some bitter love stories. Want to hear them?

t_ch: 怎么？听到我这么厉害就兴奋了？来，给爷笑一个。
t_en: What's up? Are you getting excited after hearing how amazing I am? Come on. Give me a smile.

t_ch: 跟机巧鸟讲话真没意思。
t_en: There's really no point in talking to a cycrane.

t_ch: 我知道你是什么意思，你还是认为我和一个会发声的木偶没有差别。
t_en: I know what you mean. You think there's no difference between me and a talking puppet.

t_ch: 哎呀呀，有机物还是太狭隘了。不过，我也不怪你，谁让我是一只善解人意的机巧鸟呢。
t_en: Geez, organics are so narrow-minded. But, hey, I don't blame you. Who has made me into such an understanding cycrane?

t_ch: 来点儿土味情话。
t_en: Let's hear some cheesy pick-up lines.

t_ch: 唔，我感觉你在期待我做什么「小丑表演」…我可不干，你只是把我当作一个会讲段子的木偶而已。
t_en: Oh, I feel like you are expecting some kind of clown show. Not my thing. You are treating me like a puppet that tells little stories.

t_ch: 你要记住，在真挚而公平的感情之中，没有一句情话是土味情话。
t_en: You better remember that in sincere and fair emotions, there are no cheesy words of love.

t_ch: 梓桥让我找你回去。
t_en: Ziqiao sent me to get you back.

t_ch: 你怎么这么扫兴！我俩独处的时候，你这双眼睛…还有这张嘴，都只属于我。
t_en: You are such a bummer! While the two of us are alone, your eyes... and your mouth belong to me.

t_ch: 休要再提那个女人！
t_en: Don't mention that woman again!

t_ch: 她在等你回去呢。
t_en: She is waiting for you to return.

t_ch: 嘻嘻，我就知道她心里有我。
t_en: Hehe. I knew she still longed for me.

t_ch: 其实你回不回去，我无所谓。
t_en: I don't really care if you go back or not.

t_ch: 哎，多么嘴硬的一个人，嘴上说着无所谓，心里却在着急。
t_en: Ah, sharp words. Your words say you don't care, but your heart is frantic.

t_ch: 看，把你急坏了吧，嘻嘻，我正打算回去了。
t_en: See. I've got you all worked up. Hehe. I'm just planning on heading back.

t_ch: 但是让爷就这样灰溜溜地回去，那可不行。
t_en: That said, making me head back in such a glum mood is not OK.

t_ch: 自从我获得了共情能力，知晓了爱人和被爱的感受，我就决定要忠诚于自己的欲望！
t_en: Since I gained the ability to empathize, I've come to understand what loving others and being loved feel like. I decide to be loyal to my own desires!

t_ch: 我不要再当一只无趣的机巧鸟，我想爱人，我也想被爱！我要很多很多的爱，懂吗！
t_en: I no longer wish to be a boring cycrane. I wish to love and be loved! I long for so much love. Do you understand!?

t_ch: 这是最后一件事，如果你帮我完成了，我就回到鹤运物流，这样如何？
t_en: Here's the last thing. If you help me with this, I'll go back to Heron Express. How about that?

t_ch: 成交！但是你要做什么事呢？
t_en: Deal! What do you want me to do?

t_ch: 太好了，知我心者，莫若君也。
t_en: Excellent. Who knows my heart better than your respectable self?

t_ch: 我要找一份被海关扣押的画册，小机巧鸟不能看的那种！嘿嘿嘿……
t_en: I want a photo book that has been seized by customs. Something that a little cycrane can't look at! Hehehe...

t_ch: 这时你不禁回想起这只机巧鸟带给你的第一印象，它眼里所闪耀的，确实是「欲望」的本源——
t_en: You couldn't help but recall the first impression this cycrane gave you. There was a sparkle in its eyes. That's the source of desire.

t_ch: 哪有这么多破事儿，不帮。
t_en: What's all this nonsense? I'll pass.

t_ch: 你听我说完，这件事儿对你也有好处。
t_en: Hear me out. This will benefit you, too.

t_ch: 什么好处？
t_en: What benefit?

t_ch: 我要找一份被海关扣押的画册，小机巧鸟不能看的那种！事成之后，你也有份，嘻嘻嘻。
t_en: I want a photo book that has been seized by customs. Something that a cycrane can't look at! After you get it, you can have a copy, too. Hehehe.

t_ch: 这时你不禁回想起这只机巧鸟带给你的第一印象，它眼里所闪耀的，确实是「欲望」的本源——
t_en: You couldn't help but recall the first impression this cycrane gave you. There was a sparkle in its eyes. That's the source of desire.
